title: Vanniappar Temple
tagline: Vanniappar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Vanniappar temple is located in Azwarkuruchi Village in Tirunelveli District, India.
overview.description: Vanniappar temple is located in Azwarkuruchi Village in Tirunelveli District, India. This temple is nearly 1000 years old. Since there has not been any maintenance it is in a very dilapidated condition, however, due to the effort of some devotees in the village now the temple is going undergoing a slow renovation.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Alwarkurichi
topPlaces.description: Alwarkurichi is a panchayat town in Tenkasi district in the state of Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Mannarkovil
topPlaces.description: Mannarkovil is a village near Ambasamudram, Tirunelveli district, India. There is a temple with an ashtanga vimana.

topPlaces.name: Kovankulam
topPlaces.description: Kovankulam is a hamlet in the district of Tirunelveli near Ambasamudram, Tamil Nadu, India. The spoken language in this area is Tamil.This village is located on Ambur-Papanasam Road.

topPlaces.name: Poovankurichi
topPlaces.description: Poovankurichi or Poovan Kurichi is a village situated in the district of Tirunelveli near Ambasamudram, Tamil Nadu, India. Poovan means "wind" and kurichi means "mountain or a place located near a mountain".

topPlaces.name: Karuthapillaiyur
topPlaces.description: Karuthapillaiyur is a village in the district of Tenkasi near Ambasamudram, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Kizha Ambur
topPlaces.description: Kizha Ambur also known as Keela Ambur is an ancient village situated close to the Western Ghats in Tenkasi, Tamil Nadu, India. The ancient name of this village is Snehapuri.

topPlaces.name: Valisvara Temple
topPlaces.description: Valisvara Temple is a Hindu temple located in the town of Thiruvalisvaram in the Tirunelveli district of Tamil Nadu, South India, India. The temple is dedicated to Lord Shiva.

topPlaces.name: Sivasailam Temple
topPlaces.description: Sivasailanathar Paramakalyani Amman Kovil, popularly known as Sivasailam Temple, is a Hindu temple in Sivasailam village of Tamil Nadu, India. It is located 3 miles from Alwarkurichi in Tenkasi District.

Karuthapillaiyur is a village in the district of Tenkasi near Ambasamudram, Tamil Nadu, India.
Kizha Ambur also known as Keela Ambur is an ancient village situated close to the Western Ghats in Tenkasi, Tamil Nadu, India. The ancient name of this village is Snehapuri.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Vanniappar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Vanniappar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Vanniappar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (63 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (60 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Vanniappar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Vanniappar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Vanniappar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Vanniappar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Vanniappar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Alwarkurichi, Mannarkovil, Kovankulam, Poovankurichi, Karuthapillaiyur.
